# this is the build file for project shadow
# it is autogenerated by the xmake build system.
# do not edit by hand.

# project
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.15.0)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0091 NEW)
project(shadow VERSION 0.0.1 LANGUAGES CXX C)

# target
add_library(log STATIC "")
set_target_properties(log PROPERTIES OUTPUT_NAME "log")
set_target_properties(log PROPERTIES ARCHIVE_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/build/windows/x64/release")
target_include_directories(log PRIVATE
    src/include
    src/log/include
    src/log/spdlog/include
)
target_include_directories(log INTERFACE
    src/log/include
    src/log/spdlog/include
)
target_include_directories(log PRIVATE
    build/.packages/s/spdlog/latest/8574311f4b544fa89a3d8c3ee79d1929/include
)
target_compile_definitions(log PRIVATE
    WIN32
    _WIN32
    DLLEXPORT
)
target_compile_options(log PRIVATE
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-DNDEBUG>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-DNDEBUG>
)
if(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_FRONTEND_VARIANT STREQUAL "MSVC")
    target_compile_options(log PRIVATE /EHsc)
else()
    target_compile_options(log PRIVATE -fcxx-exceptions)
endif()
set_target_properties(log PROPERTIES CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
target_compile_features(log PRIVATE c_std_99)
set_target_properties(log PROPERTIES CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
target_compile_features(log PRIVATE cxx_std_11)
if(MSVC)
    target_compile_options(log PRIVATE $<$<CONFIG:Release>:-O1>)
else()
    target_compile_options(log PRIVATE -Os)
endif()
if(MSVC)
else()
    target_compile_options(log PRIVATE -fvisibility=hidden)
endif()
if(MSVC)
    set_property(TARGET log PROPERTY
        MSVC_RUNTIME_LIBRARY "MultiThreaded$<$<CONFIG:Debug>:Debug>")
endif()
target_link_libraries(log PRIVATE
    spdlog
)
target_link_directories(log PRIVATE
    build/.packages/s/spdlog/latest/8574311f4b544fa89a3d8c3ee79d1929/lib
)
target_link_options(log PRIVATE
    /LTCG
)
target_sources(log PRIVATE
    src/log/log.cpp
)

# target
add_library(lua STATIC "")
set_target_properties(lua PROPERTIES OUTPUT_NAME "lua")
set_target_properties(lua PROPERTIES ARCHIVE_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/build/windows/x64/release")
target_include_directories(lua PRIVATE
    src/include
    src/luabridge/lua
)
target_include_directories(lua INTERFACE
    src/luabridge/lua
)
target_compile_definitions(lua PRIVATE
    LUA_COMPAT_5_1
    LUA_COMPAT_5_2
    LUA_COMPAT_5_3
    LUA_COMPAT_5_4
    LUA_USE_WINDOWS
)
target_compile_options(lua PRIVATE
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-DNDEBUG>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-DNDEBUG>
)
if(MSVC)
    target_compile_options(lua PRIVATE -W3)
else()
    target_compile_options(lua PRIVATE -Wall)
endif()
if(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_FRONTEND_VARIANT STREQUAL "MSVC")
    target_compile_options(lua PRIVATE /EHsc)
else()
    target_compile_options(lua PRIVATE -fcxx-exceptions)
endif()
set_target_properties(lua PROPERTIES CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
target_compile_features(lua PRIVATE c_std_90)
if(MSVC)
    target_compile_options(lua PRIVATE $<$<CONFIG:Release>:-O1>)
else()
    target_compile_options(lua PRIVATE -Os)
endif()
if(MSVC)
else()
    target_compile_options(lua PRIVATE -fvisibility=hidden)
endif()
if(MSVC)
    set_property(TARGET lua PROPERTY
        MSVC_RUNTIME_LIBRARY "MultiThreaded$<$<CONFIG:Debug>:Debug>")
endif()
target_link_options(lua PRIVATE
    /LTCG
)
target_sources(lua PRIVATE
    src/luabridge/lua/lapi.c
    src/luabridge/lua/lauxlib.c
    src/luabridge/lua/lbaselib.c
    src/luabridge/lua/lcode.c
    src/luabridge/lua/lcorolib.c
    src/luabridge/lua/lctype.c
    src/luabridge/lua/ldblib.c
    src/luabridge/lua/ldebug.c
    src/luabridge/lua/ldo.c
    src/luabridge/lua/ldump.c
    src/luabridge/lua/lfunc.c
    src/luabridge/lua/lgc.c
    src/luabridge/lua/linit.c
    src/luabridge/lua/liolib.c
    src/luabridge/lua/llex.c
    src/luabridge/lua/lmathlib.c
    src/luabridge/lua/lmem.c
    src/luabridge/lua/loadlib.c
    src/luabridge/lua/lobject.c
    src/luabridge/lua/lopcodes.c
    src/luabridge/lua/lparser.c
    src/luabridge/lua/lstate.c
    src/luabridge/lua/lstring.c
    src/luabridge/lua/lstrlib.c
    src/luabridge/lua/ltable.c
    src/luabridge/lua/ltablib.c
    src/luabridge/lua/ltests.c
    src/luabridge/lua/ltm.c
    src/luabridge/lua/lundump.c
    src/luabridge/lua/lutf8lib.c
    src/luabridge/lua/lvm.c
    src/luabridge/lua/lzio.c
    src/luabridge/lua/loslib.c
    src/luabridge/lua/lapi.h
    src/luabridge/lua/lauxlib.h
    src/luabridge/lua/lcode.h
    src/luabridge/lua/lctype.h
    src/luabridge/lua/ldebug.h
    src/luabridge/lua/ldo.h
    src/luabridge/lua/lfunc.h
    src/luabridge/lua/lgc.h
    src/luabridge/lua/ljumptab.h
    src/luabridge/lua/llex.h
    src/luabridge/lua/llimits.h
    src/luabridge/lua/lmem.h
    src/luabridge/lua/lobject.h
    src/luabridge/lua/lopcodes.h
    src/luabridge/lua/lopnames.h
    src/luabridge/lua/lparser.h
    src/luabridge/lua/lprefix.h
    src/luabridge/lua/lstate.h
    src/luabridge/lua/lstring.h
    src/luabridge/lua/ltable.h
    src/luabridge/lua/ltests.h
    src/luabridge/lua/ltm.h
    src/luabridge/lua/lua.h
    src/luabridge/lua/luaconf.h
    src/luabridge/lua/lualib.h
    src/luabridge/lua/lundump.h
    src/luabridge/lua/lvm.h
    src/luabridge/lua/lzio.h
)

# target
add_library(luabridge SHARED "")
set_target_properties(luabridge PROPERTIES OUTPUT_NAME "luabridge")
set_target_properties(luabridge PROPERTIES RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/build/windows/x64/release")
set_target_properties(luabridge PROPERTIES ARCHIVE_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/build/windows/x64/release")
add_dependencies(luabridge lua log)
target_include_directories(luabridge PRIVATE
    src/include
    src/luabridge/include
    src/luabridge/lua
    src/log/include
    src/log/spdlog/include
)
target_include_directories(luabridge INTERFACE
    src/luabridge/include
)
target_compile_definitions(luabridge PRIVATE
    SHARED_LIB
    WIN32
    _WIN32
    DLLEXPORT
    LUA_COMPAT_5_1
    LUA_COMPAT_5_2
    LUA_COMPAT_5_3
    LUA_COMPAT_5_4
)
target_compile_options(luabridge PRIVATE
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-DNDEBUG>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-DNDEBUG>
)
if(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_FRONTEND_VARIANT STREQUAL "MSVC")
    target_compile_options(luabridge PRIVATE /EHsc)
else()
    target_compile_options(luabridge PRIVATE -fcxx-exceptions)
endif()
set_target_properties(luabridge PROPERTIES CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
target_compile_features(luabridge PRIVATE c_std_99)
set_target_properties(luabridge PROPERTIES CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
target_compile_features(luabridge PRIVATE cxx_std_11)
if(MSVC)
    target_compile_options(luabridge PRIVATE $<$<CONFIG:Release>:-O1>)
else()
    target_compile_options(luabridge PRIVATE -Os)
endif()
if(MSVC)
    set_property(TARGET luabridge PROPERTY
        MSVC_RUNTIME_LIBRARY "MultiThreaded$<$<CONFIG:Debug>:Debug>")
endif()
target_link_libraries(luabridge PRIVATE
    lua
    log
    spdlog
)
target_link_directories(luabridge PRIVATE
    build/windows/x64/release
    build/.packages/s/spdlog/latest/8574311f4b544fa89a3d8c3ee79d1929/lib
)
target_link_options(luabridge PRIVATE
    /LTCG
)
target_sources(luabridge PRIVATE
    src/luabridge/luabridge.cpp
)

# target
add_library(map SHARED "")
set_target_properties(map PROPERTIES OUTPUT_NAME "map")
set_target_properties(map PROPERTIES RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/build/windows/x64/release")
set_target_properties(map PROPERTIES ARCHIVE_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/build/windows/x64/release")
target_include_directories(map PRIVATE
    src/include
    src/map/include
)

    src/map/include
)

    SHARED_LIB
    WIN32
    _WIN32
    DLLEXPORT
)

    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-DNDEBUG>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-DNDEBUG>
)
if(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_FRONTEND_VARIANT STREQUAL "MSVC")
    target_compile_options(map PRIVATE /EHsc)
else()
    target_compile_options(map PRIVATE -fcxx-exceptions)
endif()
set_target_properties(map PROPERTIES CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
target_compile_features(map PRIVATE c_std_99)
set_target_properties(map PROPERTIES CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
target_compile_features(map PRIVATE cxx_std_11)
if(MSVC)
    target_compile_options(map PRIVATE $<$<CONFIG:Release>:-O1>)
else()
    target_compile_options(map PRIVATE -Os)
endif()
if(MSVC)
    set_property(TARGET map PROPERTY
        MSVC_RUNTIME_LIBRARY "MultiThreaded$<$<CONFIG:Debug>:Debug>")
endif()
target_link_options(map PRIVATE
    /LTCG
)
target_sources(map PRIVATE
    src/map/map.cpp
)

# target
add_library(net SHARED "")
set_target_properties(net PROPERTIES OUTPUT_NAME "net")
set_target_properties(net PROPERTIES RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/build/windows/x64/release")
set_target_properties(net PROPERTIES ARCHIVE_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/build/windows/x64/release")
target_include_directories(net PRIVATE
    src/include
    src/net/include
)
target_include_directories(net INTERFACE
    src/net/include
)
target_compile_definitions(net PRIVATE
    SHARED_LIB
    WIN32
    _WIN32
    DLLEXPORT
)
target_compile_options(net PRIVATE
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-DNDEBUG>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-DNDEBUG>
)
if(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_FRONTEND_VARIANT STREQUAL "MSVC")
    target_compile_options(net PRIVATE /EHsc)
else()
    target_compile_options(net PRIVATE -fcxx-exceptions)
endif()
set_target_properties(net PROPERTIES CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
target_compile_features(net PRIVATE c_std_99)
set_target_properties(net PROPERTIES CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
target_compile_features(net PRIVATE cxx_std_11)
if(MSVC)
    target_compile_options(net PRIVATE $<$<CONFIG:Release>:-O1>)
else()
    target_compile_options(net PRIVATE -Os)
endif()
if(MSVC)
    set_property(TARGET net PROPERTY
        MSVC_RUNTIME_LIBRARY "MultiThreaded$<$<CONFIG:Debug>:Debug>")
endif()
target_link_options(net PRIVATE
    /LTCG
)
target_sources(net PRIVATE
    src/net/epoll.cpp
)

# target
add_executable(shadow "")
set_target_properties(shadow PROPERTIES OUTPUT_NAME "shadow")
set_target_properties(shadow PROPERTIES RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/build/windows/x64/release")
add_dependencies(shadow log util luabridge net thread map)
target_include_directories(shadow PRIVATE
    src/include
    src/util/include
    src/luabridge/include
    src/luabridge/lua
    src/net/include
    src/thread/include
    src/log/include
    src/log/spdlog/include
    src/map/include
)
target_compile_definitions(shadow PRIVATE
    SHARED_LIB
    WIN32
    _WIN32
    DLLEXPORT
    LUA_COMPAT_5_1
    LUA_COMPAT_5_2
    LUA_COMPAT_5_3
    LUA_COMPAT_5_4
)
target_compile_options(shadow PRIVATE
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-DNDEBUG>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-DNDEBUG>
)
if(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_FRONTEND_VARIANT STREQUAL "MSVC")
    target_compile_options(shadow PRIVATE /EHsc)
else()
    target_compile_options(shadow PRIVATE -fcxx-exceptions)
endif()
set_target_properties(shadow PROPERTIES CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
target_compile_features(shadow PRIVATE c_std_99)
set_target_properties(shadow PROPERTIES CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
target_compile_features(shadow PRIVATE cxx_std_11)
if(MSVC)
    target_compile_options(shadow PRIVATE $<$<CONFIG:Release>:-O1>)
else()
    target_compile_options(shadow PRIVATE -Os)
endif()
if(MSVC)
else()
    target_compile_options(shadow PRIVATE -fvisibility=hidden)
endif()
if(MSVC)
    set_property(TARGET shadow PROPERTY
        MSVC_RUNTIME_LIBRARY "MultiThreaded$<$<CONFIG:Debug>:Debug>")
endif()
target_link_libraries(shadow PRIVATE
    util
    luabridge
    lua
    net
    thread
    log
    spdlog
    map
)
target_link_directories(shadow PRIVATE
    build/windows/x64/release
    build/.packages/s/spdlog/latest/8574311f4b544fa89a3d8c3ee79d1929/lib
)
target_link_options(shadow PRIVATE
    /LTCG
)
target_sources(shadow PRIVATE
    src/config.cpp
    src/define.cpp
    src/main.cpp
    src/server.cpp
    src/test.cpp
)

# target
add_library(thread STATIC "")
set_target_properties(thread PROPERTIES OUTPUT_NAME "thread")
set_target_properties(thread PROPERTIES ARCHIVE_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/build/windows/x64/release")
add_dependencies(thread log)
target_include_directories(thread PRIVATE
    src/include
    src/thread/include
    src/log/include
    src/log/spdlog/include
)
target_include_directories(thread INTERFACE
    src/thread/include
)
target_compile_definitions(thread PRIVATE
    WIN32
    _WIN32
    DLLEXPORT
)
target_compile_options(thread PRIVATE
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-DNDEBUG>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-DNDEBUG>
)
if(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_FRONTEND_VARIANT STREQUAL "MSVC")
    target_compile_options(thread PRIVATE /EHsc)
else()
    target_compile_options(thread PRIVATE -fcxx-exceptions)
endif()
set_target_properties(thread PROPERTIES CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
target_compile_features(thread PRIVATE c_std_99)
set_target_properties(thread PROPERTIES CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
target_compile_features(thread PRIVATE cxx_std_11)
if(MSVC)
    target_compile_options(thread PRIVATE $<$<CONFIG:Release>:-O1>)
else()
    target_compile_options(thread PRIVATE -Os)
endif()
if(MSVC)
else()
    target_compile_options(thread PRIVATE -fvisibility=hidden)
endif()
if(MSVC)
    set_property(TARGET thread PROPERTY
        MSVC_RUNTIME_LIBRARY "MultiThreaded$<$<CONFIG:Debug>:Debug>")
endif()
target_link_libraries(thread PRIVATE
    log
    spdlog
)
target_link_directories(thread PRIVATE
    build/windows/x64/release
    build/.packages/s/spdlog/latest/8574311f4b544fa89a3d8c3ee79d1929/lib
)
target_link_options(thread PRIVATE
    /LTCG
)
target_sources(thread PRIVATE
    src/thread/pool.cpp
)

# target
add_library(util STATIC "")
set_target_properties(util PROPERTIES OUTPUT_NAME "util")
set_target_properties(util PROPERTIES ARCHIVE_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/build/windows/x64/release")
add_dependencies(util log)
target_include_directories(util PRIVATE
    src/include
    src/util/include
    src/log/include
    src/log/spdlog/include
)
target_include_directories(util INTERFACE
    src/util/include
)
target_compile_definitions(util PRIVATE
    WIN32
    _WIN32
    DLLEXPORT
)
target_compile_options(util PRIVATE
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-DNDEBUG>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-DNDEBUG>
)
if(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_FRONTEND_VARIANT STREQUAL "MSVC")
    target_compile_options(util PRIVATE /EHsc)
else()
    target_compile_options(util PRIVATE -fcxx-exceptions)
endif()
set_target_properties(util PROPERTIES CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
target_compile_features(util PRIVATE c_std_99)
set_target_properties(util PROPERTIES CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
target_compile_features(util PRIVATE cxx_std_11)
if(MSVC)
    target_compile_options(util PRIVATE $<$<CONFIG:Release>:-O1>)
else()
    target_compile_options(util PRIVATE -Os)
endif()
if(MSVC)
else()
    target_compile_options(util PRIVATE -fvisibility=hidden)
endif()
if(MSVC)
    set_property(TARGET util PROPERTY
        MSVC_RUNTIME_LIBRARY "MultiThreaded$<$<CONFIG:Debug>:Debug>")
endif()
target_link_libraries(util PRIVATE
    log
    spdlog
)
target_link_directories(util PRIVATE
    build/windows/x64/release
    build/.packages/s/spdlog/latest/8574311f4b544fa89a3d8c3ee79d1929/lib
)
target_link_options(util PRIVATE
    /LTCG
)
target_sources(util PRIVATE
    src/util/util.cpp
)
